message:
feat(output, router): comprehensive test coverage and wildcard syntax docs

Test Coverage for fastapi-output components:
- dependency_tree.rs: Add 18+ unit tests covering DependencyNode builder
  pattern (new, child, children, cached, scope, note, cycle methods),
  DependencyTreeDisplay configuration, and rendering edge cases
- shutdown_progress.rs: Add 15+ unit tests for ShutdownPhase labels and
  equality, ShutdownProgress builder pattern (connections, in_flight,
  background_tasks, cleanup, note methods), and display rendering modes

Router wildcard improvements:
- trie.rs: Add module-level documentation for catch-all wildcard routes
  explaining both {*name} and {name:path} syntaxes with usage examples
- Update parse_path() to support {*name} wildcard syntax as recommended
  alternative to {name:path} for catch-all routes
- Improve error message for misplaced wildcards to mention both syntaxes

These changes improve code maintainability through comprehensive test
coverage and enhance developer experience with clearer documentation
for the wildcard route feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
